narration_lines: （全景）夜幕下的半岛酒店灯火辉煌。门口豪车排列如龙，红毯从门口一直铺到大堂。巨型LED屏幕上滚动着——"陆氏集团年度慈善晚宴"。
shots.reasoning_brief: Establishing shot with no characters; visual text as narration; no dialogue or props.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 少来。你才好看，这条裙子起码六位数吧？

shots.reasoning_brief: Single character dialogue; listener inferred from context; no props or music.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LIN_YUWEI_RIVAL
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 今晚是陆氏集团的晚宴，你知道陆景琛会来对不对？

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue between two; action of holding arm implies proximity; no props.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 陆景琛和我们有什么关系。好好干活，别走神。

shots.reasoning_brief: Response dialogue; listener from prior context; single foreground.
Brief response; listener assistant from context; gaze sweeping hall.

narration_lines: 但赵一鸣注意到了——陆景琛的步子，慢了半拍。
休息时间，沈念歌靠在墙上喝水。手机屏幕亮着——一条未读消息：爸，这个月生活费我已转到你卡上。你在学校好好学习，别打太多工。
shots.reasoning_brief: Transition shot with narration; music cue; prop smartphone introduced but no handoff.

narration_lines: （近景）沈念歌看着消息，嘴角弯了弯。她父亲沈远山虽然已经不再做生意了，但每个月都会给她转生活费。她不知道父亲经历了什么，只知道几年前家里"出了点事"，从大房子搬到了小公寓。
门被推开。林雨薇走进来，手里端着两杯果汁。
shots.reasoning_brief: Visual narration; props introduced in current shot, no prior handoff.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LIN_YUWEI_RIVAL
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 来，喝杯果汁。今晚你站太久了。

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue with implied handoff in next; props from prior but no explicit handoff yet.
Handoff of cup from previous; narration for action; continuous scene.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: LIN_YUWEI_RIVAL
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 念歌，我跟你说，陆景琛真的来了。刚才进门的时候我差点被他帅到——

shots.reasoning_brief: Dialogue continuation; smartphone glance but no handoff.
Dialogue; context implies drinking pause but no new handoff.
Self-talk; no listener; dizziness from prior drink implied.

narration_lines: （中景）一张大床。两个人。被子裹着两个模糊的身影。
（近景）沈念歌先醒了。她睁开眼，头痛欲裂。天花板是陌生的——雕花吊灯，丝绸墙纸。这不是她的房间。
shots.reasoning_brief: Scene change; visual narration; no dialogue; new scene breaks prop inheritance.
Wake-up dialogue; listener inferred; new scene.
Refusal dialogue; listener butler; check implied but no prop id from prior.

dialogue_annotations.speaker: SHEN_NIANGE_MAIN
dialogue_annotations.exact_text: 我说了。我不需要。告诉你们陆少……那晚的事，我什么都不会说。你放心。

shots.reasoning_brief: Continued dialogue; push back check but no handoff annotated as prop not inherited.
Phone call to father; offscreen listener; fade out narration; music cue.
